Interface GameState

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ActionResolutionState, BonusCardSelectionState, EndGameState, EventResolutionState, RoundUpdateState, SetUpState, TotemPlacementState
public interface GameState extends Serializable
A phase of the game, modelled with the State pattern. Each concrete state implements only the actions that are legal while it is active; every other action inherits the default implementation below, which rejects the call with an IllegalStateException.
See Also:
  • it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states

    default void

    Performs end-of-round cleanup, board refill and turn-order update.

  • Method Details

    • startMatch

      default void startMatch(Game game)
      Starts the match (deck setup, initial deal, turn order).
      Parameters:
      game - the game being driven
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • placeTotemOnOffer

      default void placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
      Places the given player's totem on an offer tile.
      Parameters:
      game - the game being driven
      player - the player acting
      tile - the chosen offer tile
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • pickCards

      default void pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
      Resolves a player's card pick for the offer tile their totem sits on.
      Parameters:
      game - the game being driven
      player - the player acting
      selectedCards - the cards the player chose (possibly empty)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • pickBonusCard

      default void pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
      Resolves the optional end-of-round bonus pick.
      Parameters:
      game - the game being driven
      player - the player entitled to the bonus pick
      bonusCard - the card chosen from the upper row
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • resolveEvents

      default void resolveEvents(Game game)
      Triggers every end-of-round Event currently in play.
      Parameters:
      game - the game being driven
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • updateRound

      default void updateRound(Game game)
      Performs end-of-round cleanup, board refill and turn-order update.
      Parameters:
      game - the game being driven
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • determineWinner

      default Player determineWinner(Game game)
      Computes the winner once the game is over.
      Parameters:
      game - the finished game
      Returns:
      the winning player
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the action is not allowed in this phase

    • getPhaseName

      String getPhaseName()
      Returns:
      the human-readable name of this phase

    • isSetupPhase

      default boolean isSetupPhase()
      Returns:
      true only for the initial setup phase

    • isEndGame

      default boolean isEndGame()
      Returns:
      true only for the end-game phase
